skills.name: discourse
skills.description: - **Always backup before upgrading**: `./launcher backup app`

skills.name: nextcloud
skills.description: - **Always enable maintenance mode before upgrades**: `sudo -u www-data php occ maintenance:mode --on`

skills.name: aws-cli
skills.description: - Never commit or log AWS credentials — use `~/.aws/credentials` or environment variables only.

skills.name: azure-cli
skills.description: - Always verify the active subscription before destructive operations: `az account show`.

skills.name: finops-cost-optimization
skills.description: - Tag resources before cleanup to avoid deleting critical assets.

skills.name: gcloud
skills.description: - Never commit service account key files — use `gcloud auth` or Workload Identity instead.

skills.name: identity-access-governance
skills.description: - Default deny; grant minimum required actions/resources.

skills.name: tagging-policy-enforcement
skills.description: - Do not auto-delete untagged production resources without owner verification.

skills.name: ansible
skills.description: - Always use `--check` (dry run) before applying changes to production.

skills.name: backup-disaster-recovery
skills.description: - Never run destructive restore commands without confirming target environment and host.

skills.name: canary-bluegreen-deployments
skills.description: - Never shift all traffic before health and error checks pass.

skills.name: capacity-planning-forecasting
skills.description: - Forecast using at least 30-90 days of data.

skills.name: certbot
skills.description: - **Let's Encrypt has rate limits** — 50 certificates per registered domain per week.

skills.name: chaos-engineering
skills.description: - Run chaos only on approved non-critical targets first.

skills.name: chatops-incident-communication
skills.description: - Never post secrets, tokens, or raw credential material to chat channels.

skills.name: compliance-evidence-automation
skills.description: - Evidence bundles must exclude secrets and PII where not required.

skills.name: data-retention-archival
skills.description: - Never purge data without approved retention policy.

skills.name: docker-compose
skills.description: - **`docker compose down -v` deletes volumes** — data loss if volumes contain databases.

skills.name: gitlab-runner
skills.description: - Don't use shared runners for sensitive builds — they can leak secrets between projects.

skills.name: grafana
skills.description: - Change the default admin password immediately after install.

skills.name: high-availability-clustering
skills.description: - Test failover procedures in staging before production rollout.

skills.name: incident-diagnostics
skills.description: - Collect evidence before restarting services unless there is an active outage requiring immediate recovery.

skills.name: infrastructure-drift-remediation
skills.description: - Run `terraform plan` before any apply; never skip review.

skills.name: jenkins
skills.description: - Change the default admin password immediately after install.

skills.name: kubernetes
skills.description: - **Never `kubectl delete namespace` in production without triple-checking** — it deletes everything in it.

skills.name: log-rotation-storage-maintenance
skills.description: - Prefer retention and compression over ad-hoc log deletion.

skills.name: multi-region-failover
skills.description: - Failover plans must be tested regularly, not documented-only.

skills.name: patch-management-os-upgrades
skills.description: - Patch in stages (dev, staging, production) for critical systems.

skills.name: performance-tuning-stress-testing
skills.description: - Benchmark before and after each tuning change; no blind edits.

skills.name: prometheus
skills.description: - **Prometheus stores data locally** — disk fills up if retention isn't configured.

skills.name: queue-reliability-ops
skills.description: - Never enable infinite retries without backoff.

skills.name: service-dependency-mapping
skills.description: - Treat dependency maps as operational assets and keep them versioned.

skills.name: slo-sli-error-budget
skills.description: - Use customer-impact metrics, not only infrastructure metrics.

skills.name: ssl-certificate-lifecycle
skills.description: - Renew before expiry windows; do not wait for outage conditions.

skills.name: terraform
skills.description: - **`terraform destroy` deletes real infrastructure** — always review the plan first.

skills.name: zero-downtime-deploy
skills.description: - Never deploy directly into the currently active release directory.

skills.name: golang
skills.description: - Always use Go modules (`go mod init`) — GOPATH mode is legacy.

skills.name: java
skills.description: - Always set `JAVA_HOME` before running build tools — Maven and Gradle depend on it.

skills.name: nodejs
skills.description: - Never run `npm install` as root — use NVM for user-space Node installs.

skills.name: python
skills.description: - Always use virtual environments — never `pip install` into the system Python.

skills.name: rust
skills.description: - Always use `rustup` for installation — distro packages are usually outdated.

skills.name: automated-compliance-auditing
skills.description: - Run scanners in read-only mode by default.

skills.name: centralized-secrets-management
skills.description: - Never hardcode secrets in source control or container images.

skills.name: compliance-scan
skills.description: - All checks are **read-only** — no system changes are made during scanning.

skills.name: container-runtime-hardening
skills.description: - Do not run containers as root unless unavoidable.

skills.name: nessus
skills.description: - Never scan networks or hosts without explicit written authorization.

skills.name: openvas
skills.description: - Never run scans against networks or hosts you don't own or have written authorization to scan.

skills.name: sbom-supply-chain-security
skills.description: - Generate SBOM for every release artifact.

skills.name: secrets-environment-management
skills.description: - Never commit secrets to git or paste them into incident channels.

skills.name: splunk
skills.description: - Splunk Enterprise free license is limited to 500 MB/day indexing. Exceeding it blocks searching until license resets.

skills.name: ssh-hardening-incident-response
skills.description: - Keep an active root/console session open while changing SSH settings.

skills.name: waf-ddos-operations
skills.description: - Start custom rules in log/challenge mode before hard block.

skills.name: wazuh
skills.description: - Wazuh manager stores agent keys — protect `/var/ossec/etc/` and back it up regularly.

skills.name: advanced-database-tuning
skills.description: - Benchmark changes before/after; avoid tuning blindly.

skills.name: apache
skills.description: - Always `apachectl configtest` (or `apache2ctl configtest`) before restarting.

skills.name: caddy
skills.description: - Caddy automatically obtains TLS certificates — ensure DNS points to your server before enabling.

skills.name: cassandra
skills.description: - **`DROP KEYSPACE` is irreversible** — always snapshot before dropping.

skills.name: cloudflare-install
skills.description: Install and configure Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) to expose services securely without opening ports.

skills.name: cloudflare-ops
skills.description: Manage Cloudflare Tunnels, DNS routing, and service exposure after cloudflared is installed.

skills.name: dns-operations
skills.description: - Lower TTL before planned migrations.

skills.name: elasticsearch
skills.description: - **Deleting an index is irreversible** — always snapshot before deletion.

skills.name: haproxy
skills.description: - Always validate config before reload: `haproxy -c -f /etc/haproxy/haproxy.cfg`.

skills.name: memcached
skills.description: - **Memcached has no authentication by default** — never expose to the internet without firewall rules.

skills.name: mongodb
skills.description: - **`db.dropDatabase()` is irreversible** — never run without confirmation and backup.

skills.name: mysql
skills.description: - **Never run `DROP DATABASE` without double-checking** — no undo.

skills.name: nginx
skills.description: - Always `nginx -t` before `systemctl reload nginx` — a bad config kills all sites.

skills.name: postgres
skills.description: - **Never run `DROP DATABASE` without confirming** — there's no undo.

skills.name: rabbitmq
skills.description: - **Purging a queue deletes all messages** — cannot be recovered.

skills.name: redis
skills.description: - **`FLUSHALL` wipes everything** — never run in production without confirmation.

skills.name: sqlite
skills.description: - **`DROP TABLE` and `DELETE` without `WHERE` are irreversible** — backup first.

skills.name: user-permission-ops
skills.description: - Use `visudo` and `/etc/sudoers.d/` files; never edit `/etc/sudoers` blindly.

skills.name: wireguard
skills.description: - **Private keys must never be shared** — regenerate if compromised.
